title: 100 Pack 2.5 Inch Cosmetic Spatulas - Small Plastic Spatula for Cosmetics, Creams, & Crafts | Makeup Spatula or Multipurpose Mini Applicator for Mixing, Skincare, or Scraping Jars | Black
description:
Clean Out Your Containers: Maximize product use with our 100 pack of 0.25"x2.5" disposable spatulas. Easily extract creams, lotions, or makeup from containers, even in tight spaces, without getting product under your nails
DIY Skincare Creations: Our versatile mini spatulas are the perfect skincare tools for mixing your homemade skincare concoctions, including face masks, creams, and more. Plus, use these disposable makeup applicators for sampling or applying products
All Around Tool: Use our small spatula for face masks, lotions, lip balms, scrubs, and more. It’s perfect for nail accessories, small jewelry, cookie decorating, or taste testing. This disposable spatula is a must-have addition to your makeup toolkit
Convenience On The Go: Never be without a cosmetic spatula again. Our compact and lightweight beauty spatulas are designed to seamlessly slip into your pocket, bag, or luggage, ensuring you have a mini spatula wherever you may find yourself
Personal & Commercial Use: These 2.5" spatulas are perfect for essential oils, face masks, creams, or lab samples. Ideal for moving large quantities of wholesale or homemade lotions, gels, or serums, these spatulas are professional, and presentable
reviews_5s: I use these for my skin care products - it maintains the sanitary nature of the products, without risk of contamination.good value, product is well made.I'm making scrubs for ChristmS and they are the perfect size. I also like the white lids and the labels provided.Just as expected they work great for getting face cream out a jar so I don't waster product from getting it stuck under my finger nails.Very hsndy. Useful for other things as well.These are nothing fancy, but you don't need them to be! Gets my creams out of the jar with ease and goes on smoothly. Super convenient and I've probably bought these 5 times over the years!These are great for my creams. they are small enough to leave in the jar. I also use these for some of my craft mousses. Great when I forget to clean them off. There so many and tossing some will not leave you short when you need one.Item as describedI bought these for getting some eye creams and face creams out of tub packages. It helps keep me from getting lotion stuck under my fingernails!Just what i needed!
reviews_1s: I love the small spatulas for make up application! Individual jars should be available. I will either bring them back or I will hand them out to friends. I just wonder why all the other colors are offered in individual jars.The idea is great but these spatulas are too thin and too short to hold on to easilyDidn’t like sizeThese spatulas are super sharp, when I was trying to put a lip mask on it got caught on the product and my lip several times poking me. Not smooth at all.Too bad that when I receive this product, I immediately toss the bag not thinking that I would needed to return the item. The plastic sticks have a very heavy perfume sent to them. This set will not go away. I have already use alcohol. I leave the product open. I don’t reseal it and the scent does not go away. It just lingers, these are cosmetic spatulas so one would assume that they would be fragrance free because you’re putting product that’s going on your face anyhow, I do not recommend this look for another brand I will not be re-ordering from themThey are way smaller than expectedItem was packaged in a very thin film of plastic and there was spillage within box delivered. Also, I counted fewer than advertised number of small spatulas.The cover came off the container and the spatulas were all over the bottom of the box and one was hanging out of the box. Not impressed.This product was not what I thought they were too small and not sturdy enough. Plan on returning.Arrived with no lid. Several of the spatulas spilled out into to package. Not very hygienic, makes me think I was sent a used product.
